description: Auth/data project with verification and observability controls in place.

expected_validation_signals.impact: Reproducibility coverage is present for sensitive auth/session flows.
expected_validation_signals.recommended_action: Keep replay fixtures updated with schema and auth changes.

expected_validation_signals.impact: Critical user and permission changes are traceable.
expected_validation_signals.recommended_action: Ensure new privileged routes continue to use audit hooks.

expected_validation_signals.impact: Runtime guardrails reduce abuse and blast radius.
expected_validation_signals.recommended_action: Review thresholds quarterly to keep guardrails effective.
